claims.summary: Requested token count alone cannot describe the felt density of a dialogue budget.
claims.disposition: Verified separate felt-pressure profile records entropy, density, gradient, pressure, and mode packing.

claims.summary: Subtle semantic content surrounded by artifacts must survive cleanup review.
claims.disposition: Verified delicate-context, quoted-marker, dense-scaffolding, and structure-only regressions.

claims.summary: Pressure/budget correlation requires paired observations rather than a pre-generation causal claim.
claims.disposition: Routed as bounded evidence; current diagnostic explicitly says correlation is not established.

claims.summary: Automatically upgrading budget class from entropy or pressure changes live model behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait.
